data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: WhatsApp minimizes decision points to create a fast and efficient user experience.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interface with minimal interaction steps.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interface elements are designed to be easily tappable, enhancing usability on mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Larger tap targets positioned in accessible areas of the screen.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Familiar design patterns from other messaging apps to decrease learning phase for new users.
data.technical_spec: Standardized buttons and navigation based on common user expectations.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visual design enhances perception of usability, ensuring a pleasing and intuitive experience.
data.technical_spec: Modern design with a focus on aesthetics and functionality.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Design focuses on reducing cognitive load by not overwhelming users with information.
data.technical_spec: Task-oriented design approach with emphasis on task completion over information presentation.
